title: Human ENCODE LR-RNA-seq files
author: Reese, Fairlie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
cerberus.gtf - Superset of detected transcripts GTF 
 cerberus_filtered_abundance.tsv - Detected transcripts; filtered for ISMs w/ no 5'/3' end support 
 flair_filter_transcripts_no_novel_genes.gtf - GTEX GTF with novel genes filtered out 
 transcript_novelties.tsv - metadata about each detected transcript 
 cerberus_psi.tsv - psi values for tss, tes, and ic for each detected transcript 
 cerb_ids.tsv - Cerberus IDs for transcripts in GTEX 
 lr_human_library_data_summary.tsv - Library metadata for the ENCODE LR data 
 lapa_corrected.gtf - Superset of detected transcripts output from LAPA
steps_raw:
cerberus.gtf - Superset of detected transcripts GTF 
 cerberus_filtered_abundance.tsv - Detected transcripts; filtered for ISMs w/ no 5'/3' end support 
 flair_filter_transcripts_no_novel_genes.gtf - GTEX GTF with novel genes filtered out 
 transcript_novelties.tsv - metadata about each detected transcript 
 cerberus_psi.tsv - psi values for tss, tes, and ic for each detected transcript 
 cerb_ids.tsv - Cerberus IDs for transcripts in GTEX 
 lr_human_library_data_summary.tsv - Library metadata for the ENCODE LR data 
 lapa_corrected.gtf - Superset of detected transcripts output from LAPA
